headline.purpose: Page titles via the shared Heading component.

title.purpose: Section titles, card headers, lead subtitles.

quran.purpose: Quran verses only, via .font-quran. Never used for UI text.

caption.purpose: Smallest step — tab-bar labels, badges, stat captions, fine print (0.75rem).

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus state on form controls and buttons, tinted by the runtime primary.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets, dropdowns, toasts only. Resting surfaces stay flat or get rare soft ambient lift.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Hover/active background and color changes on pills and buttons.

motion.name: surface-transition
motion.purpose: Bottom-sheet rows, toggles, and larger surface state changes.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Global rule in base.scss collapses all animations/transitions for users who ask for less motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single filled CTA — Warm Earth, runtime-themeable.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--bs-primary, #795547); color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--bs-primary, #795547); border-radius: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Thmanyah Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6a4b3e; border-color: #61443a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(121, 85, 71, 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #5e4237; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with Warm Earth text, fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--bs-primary, #795547); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--bs-primary, #795547); border-radius: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Thmanyah Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--bs-primary, #795547); color: #fff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(121, 85, 71, 0.25); }

components.name: Tab Pill
components.description: Scrollable filter/section pill with icon; active state gets a 12% Warm Earth tint.
components.css: .ds-tab-pill { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid #e9ecef; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: #6c757d; font-family: 'Thmanyah Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-tab-pill:hover { background: rgba(108, 117, 125, 0.1); color: #212529; } .ds-tab-pill.ds-active { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bs-primary, #795547) 12%, transparent); border-color: transparent; color: #212529; }

components.name: Segmented Toggle
components.description: Equal-width segments for settings; active segment fills solid Warm Earth.
components.css: .ds-toggle-group { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; width: 100%; } .ds-toggle { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.6rem; border: 1px solid #e9ecef; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: none; color: #6c757d; font-family: 'Thmanyah Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-toggle:hover { background: rgba(108, 117, 125, 0.1); } .ds-toggle.ds-active { background: var(--bs-primary, #795547); border-color: var(--bs-primary, #795547); color: #fff; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Bootstrap-style field with primary-tinted focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="ابحث في الأذكار..." dir="rtl" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e9ecef; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: #fff; color: #212529; font-family: 'Thmanyah Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bs-primary, #795547) 65%, #fff); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(121, 85, 71, 0.25); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6c757d; }

components.name: Bottom Sheet Item
components.description: Action row inside bottom sheets — icon + label, tint on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-sheet-item"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 12v7a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h14a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-7M16 6l-4-4-4 4M12 2v13"/></svg>مشاركة الذكر</button>
components.css: .ds-sheet-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; background: transparent; border: none; color: #212529; font-family: 'Thmanyah Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; text-align: start; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-sheet-item:hover { background-color: #f8f9fa; }

components.name: Quran Text
components.description: Quran verse in Kitab with generous line-height — the sacred-text voice.
components.css: .ds-quran { font-family: 'Kitab', 'Thmanyah Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 2; color: #212529; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Rafeeq (رفيق) is designed as a companion you carry, not a destination you visit: light, ever-ready, personal, built around small moments of worship on the road. The system is warm minimalism — modern, clean surfaces carried by a single warm earth tone, generous Arabic typography, and quiet, flat-leaning components. Warmth comes from type, spacing, and the brown hue itself, never from ornament. The whole interface is Arabic and RTL-first. The system explicitly rejects cluttered Islamic apps drowning content in decoration, sterile SaaS-dashboard chrome, gamified dopamine mechanics, and skeuomorphic mushaf textures.
keyCharacteristics: One warm accent (Warm Earth) on calm neutral surfaces, both runtime-themeable by the user
Thmanyah Sans for UI text, Thmanyah Serif Display for headings; Kitab exclusively for Quran text
Flat, border-defined surfaces with soft ambient shadow allowed sparingly
Refined and restrained components: quiet outlines, gentle tint fills, nothing shouting
RTL-first, rem-based sizing so the user's font-scale setting scales everything

rules.name: The Runtime Theme Rule
rules.body: Colors are never hardcoded in components. Everything flows through Bootstrap CSS variables (--bs-primary, --bs-body-bg, …) and color-mix() derivations, because the user can change both the primary color and the background at runtime. A hex value in a component is a bug.

rules.name: The One Warm Voice Rule
rules.body: Warm Earth is the only accent. It appears on a small fraction of any screen — a filled button, an active state, a highlight. Its restraint is what keeps the interface calm.

rules.name: The Kitab Rule
rules.body: Kitab renders Quran text and nothing else. UI text never uses Kitab; Quran text never uses Plex.

rules.name: The Rem Rule
rules.body: All type and spacing sizes in rem. The user's font-scale setting (80–130%) works by changing the root font-size; hardcoded pixel type breaks it.

rules.name: The Borders-First Rule
rules.body: If a border or a background tint can create the separation, it does. A shadow is the exception that must justify itself.

rules.name: The Radius Rule
rules.body: Corner rounding always comes from the shared scale via CSS variables — --bs-border-radius-sm (0.5rem) for compact controls, --bs-border-radius (0.75rem) for buttons/inputs/pills, --bs-border-radius-lg (1rem) for cards, --bs-border-radius-xl (1.5rem) for dialogs, --bs-border-radius-pill for pills and badges. A hardcoded radius in a component is a bug (exception: 50% circles and the isolated ZekrImage export renderer).

dos: Do drive every color through --bs-primary / --bs-body-bg variables and color-mix() derivations — the user can retheme both at runtime.
Do size everything in rem so the 80–130% font-scale setting scales the whole interface.
Do keep Warm Earth (#795547) rare: filled CTAs, active states, and highlights only.
Do use .font-quran (Kitab) for Quran text and generous line-height (≥2) for vocalized script.
Do design RTL-first with logical properties (margin-inline, text-align: start); LTR is the derived case.
Do reuse the shared Loading/Error/Offline/Empty state components for every async surface.
donts: Don't build cluttered screens where decoration buries content — the "cluttered Islamic apps" anti-reference.
Don't reach for stat tiles, card grids, or corporate dashboard chrome — the "generic SaaS dashboard" anti-reference.
Don't add streaks, badges, or dopamine mechanics — the "over-gamified apps" anti-reference; worship is not a game.
Don't use faux leather, paper textures, or literal book metaphors — the "heavy skeuomorphic mushaf" anti-reference.
Don't hardcode hex colors in components; the Runtime Theme Rule forbids it.
Don't introduce a second accent hue; hover and active states derive from Warm Earth by mixing toward black.
Don't stack heavy shadows on resting surfaces; borders and tints first, shadows for overlays and rare ambient lift.
